text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The lineup at the spring Tenno Sho isn't anything
to sneeze at, even with Oguri Cap and Super
Creek not taking part.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One braces herself. This isn't just any race,
but an important stepping stone on her way to
becoming Umamusume of the Year.
